recommendations.overview: A group of astronauts living in the haunting emptiness of deep space struggle to cope after Earth suffers an extinction-level event.

recommendations.overview: An ever evolving alien life-form arrives on a comet from the Dark Gaseous Nebula and proceeds to consume pollution. Spewing mists of sulfuric acid and corrosive sludge, neither humanity nor Godzilla may be able to defeat this toxic menace.

recommendations.overview: A boy tries to stop aliens that have taken over his town and are brainwashing its inhabitants.
